title: Filter by subitmes
excerpt:
Hello, 
There are other topics with this issue but they are all clossed. They normally finished saying that the ability of filtering subitems was planned for Q4 2021. But at the moment is not possible. You may not filter…

posts.author: elena (elena)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
There are other topics with this issue but they are all clossed. They normally finished saying that the ability of filtering subitems was planned for Q4 2021. But at the moment is not possible. You may not filter nither in boards niether on widgets. Please!

posts.author: Branko (Branko Kleynen)
posts.cookedHtml: Yeah, I’m dealing with the same issue. You can filter on mirrored/linked tabs but not on their actual connnection within the subitems. Really frustrating.

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Branko and @elena !

It looks like there is a topic open on a similar topic right now that is being voted on (with 45 votes) here!

To help bring this issue to monday.com’s attention, you should vote there!

posts.author: Branko (Branko Kleynen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jailynn

Thnx… and done
